DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, JACQUELINE ROBINSON'S MOTION TO EXTEND JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO 9/25/2009. THE OSC IS RE-SET TO 10/27/2009 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR#3058. (212)
